webSearch.apiKey.label: Brave Search API Key
webSearch.apiKey.help: Brave Search API key (fallback: BRAVE_API_KEY env var).

webSearch.mode.label: Brave Search Mode
webSearch.mode.help: Brave Search mode: web or llm-context.

webSearch.baseUrl.label: Brave Search Base URL
webSearch.baseUrl.help: Optional Brave Search API base URL or reverse-proxy root.
